# Juicebox AI Recruiting Platform — Site Teardown
**URL:** app.juicebox.ai  
**Date:** 2026-04-14  
**Status:** Authenticated DOM analysis (full app access)  
**Generated by:** Claude Code (site-teardown)

---

## Executive Summary

Juicebox is a **recruiting automation SaaS platform** built on **Next.js + MUI + Emotion**. The product features an agent-driven interface for sourcing candidates, managing projects, and automating recruiting workflows. The architecture combines a fixed sidebar navigation with a main content area and optional right-panel drawers. The design follows a clean, minimalist aesthetic with purple brand accents and nature-inspired UI direction.

**Key characteristics:**
- Server-side rendered Next.js app with Vercel hosting
- Comprehensive analytics stack (GTM, PostHog, Customer.io, Sentry)
- Stripe-based billing with churn management (Churnkey) and referral tracking (Rewardful)
- Rich text editing via TinyMCE + TipTap
- Real-time communication ready (Pylon chat widget integrated)
- Firebase Auth for user management
- Production-grade error tracking and performance monitoring

---

## Technology Stack

| Category | Technology | Version/Details | Purpose |
|----------|-----------|-----------------|---------|
| **Framework** | Next.js (Pages Router) | Latest | Full-stack React application with server-side rendering |
| **UI Library** | Material UI (MUI) | v6+ | Component library for buttons, drawers, typography, layouts |
| **CSS-in-JS** | Emotion | Latest | Runtime styling with component-scoped CSS, `data-emotion` tags |
| **Font Rendering** | Inter (woff2) | Primary font | Clean, readable sans-serif via preload |
| **Secondary Fonts** | Nunito | Google Fonts | Secondary typography |
| **Variable Fonts** | Geist + Geist Mono | CSS modules | Monospace and variable-width typography |
| **Rich Text Editor** | TinyMCE | cdn.tiny.cloud | Full WYSIWYG editor for content creation |
| **ProseMirror Integration** | TipTap | Styles present in DOM | Collaborative rich text editing alternative |
| **Animations** | react-fast-marquee | Latest | Marquee scroll effects (`rfm-marquee` CSS classes) |
| **Toast Notifications** | Sonner | Latest | Minimal toast notification system |
| **Cookie/Consent** | Osano CMP | Latest | GDPR/privacy consent management |
| **Analytics** | Google Tag Manager (GTM) | via Stape proxy | Event tracking & conversion measurement |
| **Analytics** | PostHog | Latest | Product analytics & feature tracking |
| **Analytics** | Customer.io | Latest | Customer data platform & engagement |
| **Error Tracking** | Sentry | vercel-production env | Real-time error monitoring & crash reporting |
| **Ad Tracking** | Bing Ads | Latest | Microsoft Ads conversion tracking |
| **Authentication** | Firebase Auth | Latest | User authentication & Google sign-in |
| **Payments** | Stripe | Clover variant | Payment processing |
| **Churn Management** | Churnkey | Latest | Subscription cancellation & retention flows |
| **Referrals** | Rewardful | Latest | Affiliate & referral program management |
| **Chat Widget** | Pylon | usepylon.com | In-app chat/support messaging |
| **Scheduling** | Calendly | Embedded | Meeting scheduling integration |
| **Hosting** | Vercel | Production | Edge runtime & serverless functions |
| **Server-side Proxy** | Stape | yjwwvrsb.juicebox.ai | GTM server-side container for consent-compliant tracking |

## Design System

### Color Palette

| Color | Hex/Value | Context | Usage |
|-------|-----------|---------|-------|
| **App Background** | #FCFCFC | Neutral light gray | Primary app background (near-white with slight warmth) |
| **Panel/Card Background** | #FFFFFF | Pure white | Modal, drawer, and card backgrounds |
| **Preview Area Background** | #F8F8F8 | Neutral light gray | Left sidebar preview/detail area |
| **Primary Text** | #000000 | Pure black | Headings, primary body text |
| **Secondary Text** | rgba(0,0,0,0.65) | Semi-transparent black | Placeholder, hint text, secondary labels |
| **Brand Purple** | #7600bc | Vibrant purple | Primary CTA, links, active states, accent highlights |
| **Agent Star Icon** | #7600bc (stroke) | Purple | Agent selection indicator |
| **Borders** | #00000030 (rgba black, 18.75% opacity) | Dark gray-black | Dividers, input borders, hairlines |
| **Shadows** | #00000015 (rgba black, 8.2% opacity) | Light black | Subtle drop shadows, elevation |
| **Button Hover BG** | #f5f5f5 | Light neutral | Background on hover state |
| **Active Sidebar Item** | Distinct bg (css-gh1zni) | Purple-tinted or darker | Current nav item highlight |

**Design direction:** Nature-first, organic aesthetic — not cold/clinical SaaS look. Colors are warm and inviting.

### Typography System

| Element | Font Family | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage |
|---------|-------------|------|--------|-------------|-------|
| **Primary Font Stack** | Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif | — | — | — | All body text and default fallback |
| **Headings** | Same stack | 22px | 500 | 1.5 | Page titles, section headers |
| **Body Text** | Same stack | 14px | 400–500 | 1.5 | Standard paragraphs, labels, descriptions |
| **Small Text** | Same stack | 12–13px | 400 | 1.5 | Captions, timestamps, helper text |
| **Variable Fonts** | Geist, Geist Mono | Responsive | Adjustable | 1.5 | Modern CSS variable font rendering |

**Font loading strategy:**
- Inter loaded via woff2 preload (high priority)
- Nunito loaded via Google Fonts (secondary)
- Geist fonts via CSS modules with variable font support

### Layout & Spacing

#### Layout Structure
- **Sidebar width:** 220px (fixed, left-docked MUI Drawer)
- **Main content padding-left:** 220px (accommodates fixed sidebar)
- **Right drawer width:** 500.5px (hidden by default, slides in on right)
- **Main content layout:** Flex column, centered
- **Responsive breakpoint:** 600px (below this: mobile fallback, sidebar hidden)

#### Spacing Scale (4px grid base)
- **Micro:** 4px (tight spacing between inline elements)
- **XSmall:** 8px (small gaps, compact lists)
- **Small:** 10px (standard small spacing)
- **Regular:** 12px–16px (standard padding, gaps)
- **Large:** 24px+ (major section spacing)

#### Padding & Margins
- **Standard container padding:** 16px
- **Sidebar item padding:** 8–12px (compact)
- **Card/modal padding:** 16px
- **Section gaps:** 4px, 8px, 10px, 12px, 16px (follows 4px grid)

### Component Styles

#### Buttons
- **Primary button (juicebox-primary):** Purple (#7600bc) background, white text
- **Variant:** Contained (raised)
- **Border radius:** 4px (standard), 8px (rounded containers)
- **Transitions:** 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) (standard easing)
- **Hover state:** Slightly lighter shade, shadow elevation `2px 2px 5px #00000015`
- **Focus state:** Outline or ring (MUI default)
- **Disabled state:** Grayed out, no pointer events

#### Input Fields
- **Border style:** 1px solid #00000030
- **Background:** White or #F8F8F8
- **Focus border:** #7600bc or elevated shadow
- **Padding:** 8px 12px
- **Border radius:** 4px

#### Cards & Containers
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Border:** None (shadow-based elevation preferred)
- **Shadow:** `0 2px 5px #00000015` (subtle)
- **Border radius:** 4px–8px
- **Padding:** 16px

#### Sidebar
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Width:** 220px (fixed)
- **Drawer type:** MUI Drawer docked left
- **Shadow:** Subtle right edge shadow
- **Collapse animation:** scaleX transform, ~0.3s duration

#### Sidebar Items
- **Padding:** 8–12px
- **Active item background:** Distinct color (css-gh1zni — purple-tinted or darker)
- **Text color:** #000000 (active), rgba(0,0,0,0.65) (inactive)
- **Transition:** Background 250ms, color 250ms
- **Hover state:** Light #f5f5f5 background

#### Chat Messages
- **Message bubbles:** Cards with white or #F8F8F8 background
- **Timestamp:** 12px, rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
- **User avatar:** MuiAvatar component
- **Spacing between messages:** 12px vertical gap

#### Drawers (Left & Right)
- **Position:** Left (220px) and Right (500.5px)
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Shadow on right edge (left drawer) or left edge (right drawer):** `0 2px 5px #00000015`
- **Animation:** Slide transition ~0.5s, content transform ~2s
- **Z-index:** Above main content

### Responsive Design

| Breakpoint | Condition | Behavior |
|-----------|-----------|----------|
| **Default (≥600px)** | Desktop | Sidebar visible, right drawer toggleable, full layout |
| **Mobile (<600px)** | Mobile/tablet | Sidebar hidden or collapsible, main content full-width, simplified layout |
| **Sidebar collapse** | All sizes | Sidebar width transitions 220px → 0px, content padding adjusts, ~0.3s duration |

---

## Effects & Animations

### Sidebar Collapse Animation
- **Type:** ScaleX transform
- **Duration:** 0.3s
- **Easing:** cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
- **Direction:** Left drawer collapses to 0 width, content padding collapses
- **State:** Toggle button controls `isCollapsed` state

### Drawer Slide-In Animation
- **Type:** Translate X (right drawer slides in from right)
- **Duration:** 0.5s for drawer position
- **Content fade/transform:** ~2s secondary animation
- **Easing:** cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
- **Direction:** Right drawer translates from +500.5px to 0px

### Button & Interactive Hover Effects
- **Type:** Background color fade + shadow elevation
- **Duration:** 250ms
- **Easing:** cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)
- **From:** Solid background, light shadow
- **To:** Lighter background (#f5f5f5), elevated shadow (2px 2px 5px)

### Marquee Animation (react-fast-marquee)
- **Type:** Continuous horizontal scroll
- **CSS class:** `rfm-marquee`
- **Duration:** Adjustable per instance
- **Direction:** Left-to-right (default)
- **Easing:** Linear (marquee nature)

### Toast Notifications (Sonner)
- **Type:** Slide in from bottom, fade out
- **Duration:** 3–4s default (configurable)
- **Easing:** Ease-out
- **Stacking:** Bottom-right corner, stacked vertically
- **CSS selector:** `data-sonner-toaster`

### Transition Defaults (MUI + Emotion)
- **Standard duration:** 250ms
- **Easing function:** cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) (Material Design easing)
- **Properties:** background-color, border-color, box-shadow, color, opacity, transform

## Key Components — Implementation Details

### 1. Sidebar Navigation (Left Drawer)

**Structure & Elements:**

```
MuiDrawer (docked left, 220px width, #FFFFFF background)
├── Logo Section (top)
│   ├── jbblackicon.svg (18px height, black)
│   └── Collapse toggle button (scaleX animation)
├── Main Navigation
│   ├── "All Projects" nav item
│   ├── "All Agents" nav item
│   ├── Divider
│   ├── Project Selector (combobox dropdown)
│   ├── "Agent" nav item (ACTIVE, purple star icon #7600bc)
│   ├── "Shortlist" nav item
│   ├── Divider
│   ├── "Contacts" nav item
│   ├── "Sequences" nav item
│   ├── "Analytics" nav item (collapsible tree, +/- chevron)
│   └── "Integrations" nav item
├── Footer Section (bottom)
│   ├── Getting Started Checklist (heading, 50% progress bar)
│   ├── Quick Find button (⌘K keyboard shortcut indicator)
│   ├── Settings nav item
│   ├── Support nav item
│   ├── Divider
│   └── User Profile (avatar + name)
```

**Styling:**
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Text (inactive):** rgba(0,0,0,0.65), 14px weight 400
- **Text (active):** #000000, weight 500, purple #7600bc accent
- **Item padding:** 12px 12px
- **Item hover:** #f5f5f5 background, smooth transition
- **Active item:** Distinct background (css-gh1zni class), purple accent
- **Divider:** #00000030 border, full width
- **Icon size:** 18–20px
- **Icon color:** #000000 (inactive), #7600bc (active)

**Interactions:**
- Click nav item → Route change + active state update
- Hover nav item → Background lightens to #f5f5f5
- Click collapse button → Sidebar width 220px → 0px (scaleX animation 0.3s)
- Hover active nav item → Maintains active styling
- Project dropdown click → Combobox opens showing available projects

**MUI Components Used:**
- `MuiDrawer` (docked variant)
- `MuiButton` (nav items, collapse toggle)
- `MuiDivider`
- `MuiAvatar` (user profile)
- `MuiTypography`
- `MuiSelect` or custom combobox (project selector)
- `MuiLinearProgress` (checklist progress bar)
- `MuiIcon` (chevrons, icons)

---

### 2. Project Selector (Combobox Dropdown)

**Structure:**

```
Container (padding 12px)
├── Label "Project" (optional, 12px, secondary text)
└── Combobox
    ├── Current value: "recruitment agent"
    ├── Trigger icon: MuiIconButton (KeyboardArrowDown)
    └── Dropdown menu (optional, appears on click)
        ├── List of projects
        │   ├── Project name (text)
        │   └── Icon/indicator
        └── "Create new project" option (if applicable)
```

**Styling:**
- **Container:** 12px padding, 100% width within sidebar
- **Combobox background:** #FFFFFF
- **Combobox border:** 1px solid #00000030
- **Combobox padding:** 8px 12px
- **Combobox border-radius:** 4px
- **Text:** 14px, weight 500, #000000
- **Icon color:** #7600bc on hover, #000000 default
- **Dropdown background:** #FFFFFF
- **Dropdown border:** 1px solid #00000030
- **Dropdown item padding:** 12px
- **Dropdown item hover:** #f5f5f5 background
- **Selected item:** #7600bc text or background highlight

**Interactions:**
- Click combobox → Dropdown opens (slide down animation ~250ms)
- Hover item → Background highlights (#f5f5f5)
- Click item → Selection updates, dropdown closes
- Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, Esc closes

**MUI Components:**
- `MuiSelect` (or custom select for more control)
- `MuiMenuItem` (dropdown items)
- `MuiIconButton` (dropdown trigger)
- `MuiIcon` (KeyboardArrowDown)

---

### 3. Main Content Area — Agent Chat Interface

**Structure:**

```
Container (flex column, padding-left 220px, background #FCFCFC)
├── Header Section
│   ├── Title: "Juicebox Agent" (22px, weight 500)
│   ├── Breadcrumb or navigation (optional)
│   └── Action buttons (if any)
├── Chat Area (flex column, grows)
│   ├── Message 1 (user/assistant bubble)
│   │   ├── Avatar (MuiAvatar)
│   │   ├── Message bubble (white card, shadow)
│   │   ├── Message text (14px, #000000)
│   │   └── Timestamp (12px, rgba(0,0,0,0.65))
│   ├── Message 2
│   │   ├── Avatar
│   │   ├── Bubble: "We're all set! Would you like to start sourcing?"
│   │   └── CTA button below: "Yes, start sourcing" (purple button)
│   └── Message N
├── Input Area (bottom, sticky)
│   ├── Text input (expandable, MuiTextField)
│   ├── Send button (MuiIconButton, purple #7600bc)
│   └── Attachment/menu buttons (optional)
└── Right Drawer Toggle (if collapsed drawer state)
```

**Styling:**
- **Container background:** #FCFCFC
- **Chat area padding:** 16px
- **Message bubble background:** #FFFFFF
- **Message bubble shadow:** 0 2px 5px #00000015
- **Message bubble border-radius:** 4px
- **Message padding:** 12px 16px
- **User message align:** Right or distinct styling
- **Assistant message align:** Left
- **Avatar size:** 32px (MuiAvatar)
- **Timestamp color:** rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
- **Timestamp size:** 12px
- **Input background:** #FFFFFF
- **Input border:** 1px solid #00000030
- **Input padding:** 12px 16px
- **Input border-radius:** 4px
- **CTA button:** Purple #7600bc, white text, contained variant

**Interactions:**
- Type in input → Text appears, send button becomes active (color changes)
- Click send button → Message sent, input clears, new message appears in chat
- Click CTA button → Action triggered (e.g., "Yes, start sourcing" → start workflow)
- Hover message → Optional actions appear (delete, edit, etc.)
- Scroll chat → Auto-scroll to bottom on new messages

**MUI Components:**
- `MuiBox` (container, flex layouts)
- `MuiAvatar` (user/assistant avatar)
- `MuiPaper` or `MuiCard` (message bubbles)
- `MuiTextField` (input)
- `MuiButton` (send, CTA)
- `MuiIconButton` (send icon)
- `MuiTypography` (text rendering)

---

### 4. Right Drawer (Collapsed by Default)

**Structure:**

```
MuiDrawer (docked right, 500.5px width, #FFFFFF background, hidden by default)
├── Header
│   ├── Title (22px, weight 500)
│   └── Close button (MuiIconButton)
├── Content Area (flex column, padding 16px)
│   ├── Section 1 (e.g., Agent details, preferences)
│   │   ├── Form fields
│   │   └── Buttons
│   ├── Section N
│   └── Footer buttons (Save, Cancel, etc.)
```

**Styling:**
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Width:** 500.5px
- **Position:** Fixed right edge, z-index above main content
- **Shadow:** Left edge shadow 0 2px 5px #00000015
- **Padding:** 16px
- **Border:** None (shadow-based elevation)
- **Animation:** Translate X 0.5s on toggle, content opacity ~2s

**Interactions:**
- Click toggle button or overlay → Drawer slides in/out (0.5s)
- Click close button → Drawer closes
- Click overlay (scrim) → Drawer closes (if modal behavior enabled)
- Form changes → Automatically saved or staged for save

**MUI Components:**
- `MuiDrawer` (docked right variant)
- `MuiBox` (flex layouts)
- `MuiButton` (actions)
- `MuiTextField` (inputs)
- `MuiTypography` (labels, headings)

## Design System Variables (Emotion/CSS-in-JS)

### CSS Custom Properties / Emotion Imports
```javascript
// Color tokens
const colors = {
  appBg: '#FCFCFC',
  panelBg: '#FFFFFF',
  previewBg: '#F8F8F8',
  textPrimary: '#000000',
  textSecondary: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)',
  brandPurple: '#7600bc',
  border: '#00000030',
  shadow: '#00000015',
};

// Spacing scale
const spacing = {
  xs: '4px',
  sm: '8px',
  md: '12px',
  lg: '16px',
  xl: '24px',
};

// Typography
const typography = {
  h1: { fontSize: '22px', fontWeight: 500, lineHeight: 1.5 },
  body1: { fontSize: '14px', fontWeight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5 },
  body2: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5 },
  caption: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5 },
};

// Transitions
const transitions = {
  standard: 'all 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)',
  slow: 'all 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)',
  fast: 'all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)',
};
```

## Build Plan & Recommended Tech Stack

### Recommended Stack
1. **Framework:** Next.js 13+ (Pages Router) with TypeScript
2. **UI Library:** MUI v6+ with TypeScript
3. **Styling:** Emotion (CSS-in-JS)
4. **Fonts:** Inter + Nunito + Geist variable fonts
5. **Rich Text:** TinyMCE + TipTap (ProseMirror)
6. **Animations:** Framer Motion (more powerful than react-fast-marquee for complex effects)
7. **Notifications:** Sonner (toast library)
8. **State Management:** Redux Toolkit or Zustand (based on data complexity)
9. **API Client:** Axios or tRPC (if type-safe RPC desired)
10. **Authentication:** Firebase Admin SDK (backend), Firebase JS SDK (frontend)
11. **Analytics:** PostHog SDK + GTM via Stape
12. **Deployment:** Vercel (native Next.js support)
13. **Error Tracking:** Sentry SDK
14. **Database:** PostgreSQL (likely backend, not visible in DOM)

### Section-by-Section Build Order

#### Phase 1: Foundation (Weeks 1–2)
1. **Project setup** (Next.js, TypeScript, MUI, Emotion)
2. **Design tokens** (colors, typography, spacing, transitions)
3. **Layout shell** (sidebar + main content flex structure, responsive breakpoints)
4. **Navigation component** (sidebar items, active states, collapse animation)

#### Phase 2: Core UI (Weeks 2–3)
5. **Project selector** (combobox, dropdown styling, interactions)
6. **Main content area** (flex layout, padding adjustments)
7. **Chat message component** (message bubbles, avatars, timestamps)
8. **Chat interface** (scrollable message list, input area, send button)

#### Phase 3: Rich Features (Weeks 3–4)
9. **Right drawer** (structure, slide animation, content sections)
10. **Toast notifications** (Sonner integration, theme matching)
11. **Rich text editor** (TinyMCE or TipTap integration, styling)
12. **Input fields & forms** (validation, error states, accessibility)

#### Phase 4: Interactivity (Week 4)
13. **State management** (Redux/Zustand setup, actions for nav, chat, forms)
14. **API integration** (backend endpoints for messages, projects, agents)
15. **Real-time chat** (WebSocket or polling for live messages)
16. **File uploads & attachments** (if applicable)

#### Phase 5: Analytics & Auth (Week 5)
17. **Firebase Auth** (login, Google sign-in, user session management)
18. **PostHog integration** (event tracking, feature flags)
19. **GTM via Stape** (consent-compliant tracking, conversion pixels)
20. **Sentry setup** (error monitoring, source maps)

#### Phase 6: Polish & Deployment (Week 6)
21. **Performance optimization** (code splitting, image optimization, lazy loading)
22. **Accessibility audit** (keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, screen reader testing)
23. **Responsive testing** (600px breakpoint, mobile layout)
24. **Cross-browser testing** (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
25. **Deployment** (Vercel, environment variables, secrets)

---

## Implementation Notes & Gotchas

### MUI Configuration
- **Emotion theme provider required** (wraps Next.js _app component)
- **Custom breakpoints:** 600px for mobile fallback
- **Component overrides:** Custom className patterns (e.g., `css-gh1zni`, `css-1f9ab4h`) suggest deep component customization
- **Drawer behavior:** `variant="permanent"` for left drawer, `variant="temporary"` or `variant="persistent"` for right

### Next.js Specific
- **Pages Router:** Routes in `/pages` directory (e.g., `/pages/agent.tsx`)
- **API routes:** Backend endpoints in `/pages/api/` (e.g., `/pages/api/messages`)
- **Static assets:** SVGs, fonts in `/public/` directory
- **Vercel deployment:** Set env vars for Firebase, Stripe, Analytics keys

### Styling Pitfalls
- **Emotion specificity:** Component-scoped CSS classes (`data-emotion="css ..."`) — ensure theme provider wraps entire app
- **MUI conflicts:** Custom Emotion classes may conflict with MUI defaults — use composition pattern or style override API
- **Font preloading:** `<link rel="preload" href="..." as="font">` critical for performance
- **Dark mode:** Not present in current design, but theme provider supports it if needed later

### Performance Considerations
- **Code splitting:** Split chat, editor, and drawer into separate chunks
- **Image optimization:** Use Next.js Image component for avatars
- **Lazy loading:** Load TinyMCE and right drawer content only when needed
- **Bundle size:** Emotion + MUI + TinyMCE is substantial — monitor with `@next/bundle-analyzer`

### Accessibility (a11y)
- **Keyboard navigation:** Tab through sidebar items, buttons, and form fields
- **ARIA labels:** Add to icon-only buttons (collapse, send, close drawer)
- **Focus management:** Trap focus in modals/drawers
- **Color contrast:** #7600bc brand purple passes WCAG AA for text on white
- **Screen readers:** Semantic HTML, alt text for images, aria-live for toast notifications

### Browser Compatibility
- **Target:** Modern browsers (Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+)
- **CSS features:** CSS Grid, Flexbox, Custom Properties, CSS Variables (all well-supported)
- **JavaScript:** ES2020 (optional chaining, nullish coalescing, etc.)
- **Polyfills:** Minimal (Emotion handles prefixes automatically)

---

## Security Considerations

### Authentication
- **Firebase Auth:** Managed by Firebase, uses secure tokens (JWT)
- **Google sign-in:** Redirect-based OAuth 2.0 flow (no credentials in DOM)
- **Session storage:** Tokens in memory or HttpOnly cookies (backend responsibility)

### Data Protection
- **Sentry:** PII redaction enabled (check config to exclude sensitive data)
- **PostHog:** User ID anonymization possible
- **Customer.io:** Requires compliance with data retention policies
- **Analytics:** GDPR compliant via Osano CMP + Stape server-side proxy

### Content Security Policy (CSP)
- Allow TinyMCE CDN (cdn.tiny.cloud)
- Allow Firebase scripts (firebase.google.com)
- Allow Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com)
- Allow Sentry (sentry.io)
- Allow PostHog (posthog.com)
- Restrict script-src to HTTPS only

---

## Testing Strategy

### Unit Tests
- **Components:** Test sidebar, project selector, message bubble in isolation
- **Utilities:** Test message formatting, date/time formatting
- **Hooks:** Test custom hooks for chat state, auth, etc.
- **Tool:** Jest + React Testing Library

### Integration Tests
- **Navigation:** Test sidebar click → route change → content update
- **Chat flow:** Send message → API call → message appears in list
- **Form submission:** Fill project selector → API call → sidebar updates
- **Tool:** Cypress or Playwright (E2E)

### Visual Regression
- **Tool:** Percy, Chromatic, or VRT tool
- **Coverage:** Sidebar states (expanded/collapsed, active items), chat messages, drawers

### Performance
- **Lighthouse audit:** Target scores 90+ (Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, SEO)
- **Bundle size:** Monitor with `@next/bundle-analyzer` (target <500KB gzipped for main bundle)
- **Metrics:** LCP, FID, CLS within Core Web Vitals thresholds

---

## Deployment & Environment

### Environment Variables
```
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=...
FIREBASE_ADMIN_PRIVATE_KEY=...
STRIPE_PUBLIC_KEY=...
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_ID=... (or Stape proxy URL)
```

### Vercel Configuration
- **Build command:** `next build`
- **Start command:** `next start`
- **Node version:** 18.x or higher
- **Serverless functions:** API routes auto-deployed
- **Environment:** Production (vercel-production Sentry env configured)

---

## Post-Launch Checklist

- [ ] Verify all links and navigation paths
- [ ] Test login flow (Firebase Auth, Google sign-in)
- [ ] Check all CTA buttons trigger correct actions
- [ ] Confirm chat API connectivity and real-time updates
- [ ] Validate analytics events fire (PostHog, GTM)
- [ ] Test error handling (Sentry captures errors correctly)
- [ ] Verify payment flow (Stripe, Churnkey)
- [ ] Check email notifications (Customer.io)
- [ ] Validate consent banner (Osano CMP)
- [ ] Performance audit (Lighthouse 90+)
- [ ] Accessibility audit (WAVE, axe DevTools)
- [ ] Cross-browser testing (major browsers)
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness (<600px)
- [ ] Staging environment URLs all configured
- [ ] Production secrets securely stored in Vercel
- [ ] Error monitoring enabled (Sentry)
- [ ] Analytics data flowing (PostHog, GTM)
- [ ] Backup & disaster recovery plan documented
